title: Learn From 2024's Most Popular Python Tutorials and Courses
content: — FREE Email Series — 🐍 Python Tricks 💌  🔒 No spam. Unsubscribe any time. Table of Contents Table of Contents As we welcome 2025, it’s the perfect time to reflect on the exciting advancements the Python community made in 2024.Python 3.13stood out as a milestone release, introducing ground-breaking experimental features likefree threading and a just-in-time (JIT) compiler, both designed to boost performance. TheREPLalso received an upgrade, with a modern redesign that enhances the coding experience for developers of all levels. These updates, along with othercool new features, have reinforced Python’s reputation as a continually evolving and versatile language. Python’s influence continued to grow in 2024. It secured the top spot inIEEE Spectrum’s annual rankingof programming languages, while the2023 Python Developers Surveyfurther highlighted its widespread popularity and global appeal. Other notable developments include the release ofAstral’s uvproject manager and major releases of bothNumPyandPolars. Plus, the release ofPython 3.14 Alpha 1introduced lazy evaluation for annotations, fixing a long-standing pain point in Python’s type hinting capabilities. Here at Real Python, we’re excited to showcase the tutorials and video courses that engaged our readers and viewers throughout 2024. From masteringPython basicstobuilding innovative projects, sharpeningdata science skills, andoptimizing your workflow, this list covers a wide range of topics to help you grow as a Python developer. Take a moment to explore the highlights of the year that inspired our community to learn, create, and achieve more with Python. Join Now:Click here to join the Real Python Newsletterand you’ll never miss another Python tutorial, course, or news update. Before getting down to the business of coding, it’s important to have a well-organized workspace that boosts productivity and keeps frustrations at bay. Whether you’re customizing your code editor, setting up virtual environments, or managing project dependencies, the right tools can make all the difference. With these resources, you can learn how to set up a Python environment that works for you: By learning how to set up your Python environment correctly from the start, you’ll save time, reduce headaches, and enjoy a smoother, more pleasant coding experience. No matter where you are in your Python journey, revisiting the basics can sharpen your skills and improve your coding habits. Building a solid foundation in topics like dictionaries, functions, loops, lists, and tuples will give you what it takes to write clean and maintainable code. In these exercise courses, you’ll practice Python fundamentals to help solidify your understanding: Working through these courses will give you the clarity you need to explore more advanced programming topics. Functions are at the heart of Python programming. They allow you to write reusable, modular code, and make your programs cleaner and easier to maintain. Whether you want to explore built-in functions or learn about decorators, a solid understanding of functions will take your skills to the next level. You can sharpen your knowledge of Python functions with these tutorials: By exploring these resources, you’ll unlock the many aspects of functions that can make your programs more readable and productive. Object-oriented programming (OOP) is a powerful paradigm that organizes your code into classes and objects. By leveraging OOP, you can write modular, reusable, and scalable code that’s easier to manage as projects grow. Key concepts like classes, duck typing, and magic methods make Python’s implementation of OOP especially flexible. These tutorials introduce you to essential OOP concepts and techniques: When you master object-oriented programming, you’ll be able to design robust programs that evolve seamlessly with your projects. Python’s vast ecosystem of libraries makes it a top choice for data science. Whether you’re parsing JSON, crunching numbers with NumPy, or exploring the cosmos, Python tools simplify the process of analyzing and interpreting complex datasets. Check out these resources to expand your data science toolkit: Learning about these powerful tools will help you to analyze and manipulate complex datasets and take your work to new heights, both here on Earth and beyond. One of the best ways to sharpen your Python skills is to roll up your sleeves and build something—whether it’s fun, practical, or a bit of both! From games and AI chatbots to GUI applications and tools, hands-on projects are a great way to learn while creating something you can use, show off, or play. Here’s a mix of tutorials and courses from the year that will help you bring your own ideas to life: Whether you’re building for fun or utility, these projects will help you learn by doing, and leave you with something to share and be proud of. Python simplifies web-based tasks, from data scraping and API interactions to learning the basics of front-end tools. These skills are vital for web development, automation, and working with online services. By working through these courses, you’ll gain solid web development skills: These courses will empower you to work confidently with online data and create dynamic web applications, unlocking Python’s full potential for web development. Good developers write code that works. Great developers test their code to ensure it works under all conditions. Learning to use tools likeunittest,pytest, and even AI tools will help you identify bugs early, streamline development, and improve the reliability of your Python programs. To elevate your testing skills, check out these tutorials: Not only will improving your testing skills give you peace of mind, but it will help you deliver higher-quality code. Errors happen to everyone, but the way you handle them sets you apart. From modern linters to understanding Python’s built-in exceptions, the tools and concepts featured in these resources will help you catch, debug, and prevent errors more effectively: By using a linter, understanding Python’s built-in exceptions, and applying smart coding strategies, you’ll spend less time chasing bugs and more time building robust applications. Data structures can be a bit of a mystery until you learn how to use them effectively. Whether you’re simplifying data validation, organizing information, or matching complex patterns, mastering data structures is essential for writing clean and efficient code. These resources will help you understand how to work with Python data structures: By exploring these resources, you’ll turn data structures into a powerful asset in your programming toolkit. With Python’s extensive tools and libraries, you can tackle projects of all kinds. Whether you’re grouping data with pandas, working with machine learning libraries, or managing databases, these courses will help you expand your Python skill set: Exploring these resources will deepen your understanding of powerful libraries and prepare you to handle diverse projects with even more ease and expertise. Every developer loves tools that make life easier. Python’s rich ecosystem allows you to automate repetitve tasks, simplify dependency management, and create professional project documentation, all while staying organized and productive. If you’re interested in learning how to fine-tune your development process, then check out these resources: With a streamlined workflow, you’ll spend less time on repetitive tasks and more time writing great code. As we wrap up 2024, Python’s steady growth and evolution continue to make it a favorite among developers. With the exciting advancements that came withPython 3.13and the ongoing expansion of the global community, this year offered plenty of opportunities to learn and innovate. At Real Python, we’ve enjoyed sharing the latestcommunity news,office hours,quizzes, and more with you. If you’re looking to explore more curated content, then check out ourPython Learning Paths. These tailored paths are designed to help you navigate topics at basic, intermediate, and advanced levels, giving you a structured way to achieve your learning goals. For more insights, discussions, and interviews with Python developers from around the world, don’t missThe Real Python Podcast. It’s the perfect way to stay connected with the Python community and discover new ideas and tools to elevate your coding journey. Thank you for being part of the Real Python community. We’re excited to continue supporting your learning journey in the year ahead. Here’s to a productive and inspiring 2025!
